title: Fix network page: search input missing aria-label
description:
The network page has a search input (id='network-search') that lacks an aria-label. It has a visual label above it ('Search Network') but no programmatic association. Add `aria-label="Search network papers and relationships"` to the input element.

Do NOT output any thinking or explanation. Output ONLY search/replace blocks.

title: Fix broken author detail page links for multi-word names
description:
The authors page generates links to /author/{id} for each author. Some author IDs produce 404 errors (e.g., /author/dunne_brenda, /author/jahn_robert). Check how the author ID is generated from the author name string. The function `generateAuthorId` converts names like 'Dunne, Brenda' to a URL slug. The issue may be that the [id].astro dynamic route uses a different ID format than what the authors page generates. Check both files and ensure the ID generation matches.

Look at how the author/[id].astro page resolves the author: it likely iterates catalog.papers and matches the URL param against generated IDs. If the ID generation logic differs between authors.astro and author/[id].astro, unify them.

Do NOT output any thinking or explanation. Output ONLY search/replace blocks.
